finding: Steps 5 and 6 have contradictory ordering — rename first (step 5) then skip if exists (step 6). Should check before rename.
suggestion: Reorder: check existence first, then rename only if absent. Or specify rename-and-overwrite is intentional.

finding: Config precedence (CLI > env > default) stated only in Section 5.1 under store path. Not explicitly stated for all other flag/env pairs.
suggestion: Add general config precedence rule in Section 10 covering all options.

finding: 3-failure sliding window: per-worker or global? Resets on successful download?
suggestion: Specify: global across all workers. State whether intervening successes reset the window.

finding: CAS-missing re-download retry count and exit code undefined.
suggestion: Subject to Section 11.2 retry policy. Exit 3 on failure.

finding: branch-alias is a map but aliases is an array. Transformation undefined.
suggestion: Specify: aliases is always array() for root in MVP. For packages, use array() unless branch-alias values are relevant.

finding: composer dumpautoload working directory, env vars, stdout/stderr handling unspecified.
suggestion: Specify: working dir = project root, stderr forwarded, stdout suppressed unless --verbose.

finding: Status output '47 packages' — counted from what? Platform pseudo-packages included or excluded?
suggestion: State: count = non-platform packages (packages + packages-dev, excluding php/ext-*/lib-*).

finding: Probe temp file created 'in the store directory' — which subdirectory? Root vs tmp/?
Manifest pruning with --project-dir not documented in algorithm steps.
suggestion: Define --project-dir behavior or defer to post-MVP.

finding: Root entry version normalization undefined. Complex Composer rules.
suggestion: State: use composer.json version verbatim, or dev-main as default.

finding: 0444/0555 set via chmod or file creation mode? Umask interaction unclear.
suggestion: Specify: use explicit chmod after creation, ignoring umask.

finding: du behavior varies by OS for CoW. Test may be non-deterministic.
suggestion: Mark as benchmark-only or specify exact measurement method.

finding: Windows binary shipped but vendor/bin broken. No runtime warning.
suggestion: Add runtime warning on Windows when install completes.
